description: Calligraphic list of 29 persons (to be solicited), professions ranging from butcher to physician. A list of potentially related names in Arabic script appears on the verso (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, 497, App. C 71)
description_he: רשימה קליגרפית של 29 אנשים (לגיוס), מקצועות מקצב ועד רופא
